about.label: About
about.heading: Designing and building for real products
about.body: I'm a UX Engineer with a strong focus on building real, production-ready web interfaces. I work across design and frontend development to create clear, usable, and high-performing experiences—from landing pages to full product interfaces. My approach is simple: build fast, keep it clean, and make sure it scales when it needs to.
about.tags: Landing pages • Web apps • Design systems • Frontend architecture

projects.title: Web applications
projects.description: Responsive, production-ready apps with clean architecture and strong UX foundations.

projects.title: UI systems (when needed)
projects.description: Reusable components and UI foundations that keep products consistent and scalable.

contact.label: Contact

contact.body: Let's build your next web experience. I design and build complete web experiences—from landing pages to full product interfaces. If you need a fast, polished, and production-ready frontend, let's talk.
